_comment: UBA attribute categories and their contained attributes. Physical attributes (Speed, Agility, Strength, Vertical) are calculated from height/weight and are not archetype-capped. shared attributes (e.g. Close Shot, Speed With Ball) use the highest applicable cap.

shooting.label: Shooting
shooting._comment: Capped by Primary/Secondary/Weakness archetype. Shot IQ defaults to 80 and is not configurable.

slashing.label: Slashing
slashing._comment: Driving Layup and Driving Dunk shared with other categories. Speed With Ball shared with Playmaking.

playmaking.label: Playmaking
playmaking._comment: Speed With Ball is shared with Slashing. Its value is the same across both categories.

defense.label: Defense
defense._comment: Help Defense IQ is pinned at 80 baseline and is not configurable.

rebounding.label: Rebounding & Inside Finish
rebounding._comment: Close Shot and Standing Dunk shared with Post Scoring.

postScoring.label: Post Scoring
postScoring._comment: Close Shot and Standing Dunk shared with Rebounding. Only one value per shared attribute.

physical.label: Physical
physical._comment: These are capped by height/weight, not archetype. Speed and Agility get penalties from weight class.
